metrics.description: Face, hairline, body identity, and character registry match remain stable.
Skeleton, shoulders, pelvis, knees, and stance preserve intended action/blocking.
No extra/missing people or merged body fragments.
Body proportions are anatomically plausible for the selected profile.
Paired regions remain balanced unless asymmetry is intentional.
No visible seams, hard mask boundaries, or warped borders.
Skin texture continuity survives the shape correction.
Clothing follows the corrected body shape without tearing or floating.
Corrected region remains inside frame with safe margins.

hard_anatomy_promotion_rule: All applicable regional statuses must be pass-like, all required regions must be inspectable, hard rejection must be false, and promotion_allowed must be true. Numeric score cannot override a regional hard failure.
